title: callianthe maritima
intro: Callianthe maritima, also known as sea heath or sea purslane, is a flowering succulent plant that grows in coastal areas and is commonly found in Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callianthe maritima include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health, due to its high content of vitamins and minerals. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support skin and digestive health.
